name: 108oz Glassware Kitchen Storage - Threshold™: Clear Glass, Dishwasher-Safe, 8.27" Height, Lifetime Warranty
description:
Store your cookies, candies and sweets in this 96-Ounce Glassware Kitchen Storage Jar from Threshold™. Made of transparent glass, this jar allows you to easily see what you've stored inside. Plus, it comes with a glass lid with a knob for easy opening. Dishwasher safe, this 96-ounce jar is great for storing a range of tasty treats.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
